# Preview Sites

Auto-generated website previews for local business outreach.

## Structure

```
sites/
  {lead-slug}/
    index.html      — redesigned website preview
    styles.css       — external stylesheet
    metadata.json    — build metadata
```

## Deployment

Connected to Vercel for automatic deployment on push.
Each preview is accessible at: `https://{domain}/sites/{lead-slug}/`

## Generated by

Revenue Leak Engine — Preview Build Worker
